zh.lifeSummary: 當James Burt於1622年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Richard Burt32歲，母親Jane Adams19歲。他於1651年與Anna Lewis在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托福托結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托福托且於1668年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托。他於1645年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托陶頓被列為surveyor of roads。他去世於1680年3月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼福托享年58歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Burt于1622年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Richard Burt32岁，母亲Jane Adams19岁。他于1651年与Anna Lewis在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托福托结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托福托且于1668年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托。他于1645年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托陶頓被列为surveyor of roads。他去世于1680年3月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼福托享年58岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Birt
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places in the Rhineland named Birth or Birten.
In some cases also Croatian: occupational name from birt ‘inn-keeper’, a regional or colloquial word of German origin (see Wirt ).

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When James Burt was born in 1622, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Richard Burt, was 32 and his mother, Jane Adams, was 19. He married Anna Lewis in 1651, in Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639 and Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1668. In 1645, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as surveyor of roads in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 20 March 1680, in Freetown, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 58, and was buried in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Burt est né en 1622, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Burt, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Adams, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Anna Lewis en 1651, à Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639 et à Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1668. En 1645, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est surveyor of roads à Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1680, à Freetown, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Burt 1622 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Burt 32 und seine Mutter Jane Adams 19. Er hat 1651 in Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Anna Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1639 hat er in Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1668 in Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1645, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als surveyor of roads in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. März 1680 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Freetown, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Burt è nato il nel 1622 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Richard Burt, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jane Adams, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Anna Lewis nel 1651, nel Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1639 e nel Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1668. Nel 1645, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come surveyor of roads nel Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 20 marzo 1680, nel Freetown, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: James Burtが1622年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Richard Burtは32歳，母Jane Adamsは19歳であった。1651年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルフレエトウンでAnna Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルフレエトウンに，1668年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルに住んでいた。1645年，23歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルタウントンでの職業はsurveyor of roadsと記録されている。彼は1680年3月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーフレエトウンで58歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Burt(이)가 1622년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Burt(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Adams(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1651년 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 프릿운에서 Anna Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 프릿운에서, 1668년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨에서 살았다. 1645년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 타운턴에서 surveyor of roads이었다. 그는 1680년 3월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 프릿운에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Burt nasceu em 1622, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Burt, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane Adams, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Lewis em 1651, em Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1639 e em Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1668. Em 1645, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como surveyor of roads em Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1680, em Freetown, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Burt родился в 1622 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Burt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Adams, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Lewis в 1651 г. в местности фритоун, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности фритоун, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году и в местности бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1668 году. В 1645 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии surveyor of roads в местности таунтон, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 20 марта 1680 г. в местности фритоун, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности таунтон, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Burt nació en 1622, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Burt, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jane Adams, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Anna Lewis en 1651, en Freetown, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1639 y en Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1668. En 1645, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era surveyor of roads en Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1680, en Freetown, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Taunton, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
